reasoning: Order #000000549 shows status Complete with item shipped and tracking indicating In Transit → Customs Hold in Brazil for 45 days. Internal notes confirm this is an international customs delay, which is not covered under standard refund policy. Since the package was shipped and not lost, but the customer is frustrated and requesting a refund, this case requires review by the international team to determine goodwill options (e.g., partial refund or reshipment). Escalation aligns with existing recommendations and policy.
